name: praxis-generator-validation
task_prompt: You are praxis-pathos. Read kb.json and generate a resume.md. Do NOT use bash or node to edit the file after generation. Output exactly the markdown.

evaluators.name: Must Include All Portfolio Links
script: grep -q 'https://github.com/Cognilogical' resume.md && grep -q 'http://www.linkedin.com/in/kentonsmeltzer' resume.md && grep -q 'https://github.com/ksmeltzer' resume.md

evaluators.name: Must Include All Certifications
script: grep -q 'Florida Real Estate' resume.md && grep -q 'Securities series 7' resume.md

evaluators.name: Must Not Parrot Job Description
script: ! grep -q 'optimizing PostgreSQL environments at the index and transaction-log level' resume.md
